---
name: Chore
about: Other changes that do not modify src or test files (chore:)
---

## Summary

<!-- e.g. tooling, repo hygiene, config that is not ci/build/docs -->

## Commits

Use **`chore:`** or **`chore(scope):`**, e.g. `chore: update editorconfig`.

Dependency-only bumps that Release Please treats as releasable may use **`deps:`** where applicable (see `.github/RELEASE_SETUP.md`).

## Checklist

- [ ] Scope is appropriate (not a disguised feature or fix)
- [ ] No unrelated files committed
